ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically detect changes to skill files
ast.target: 自动检测技能文件的更改

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay before re-scanning after file changes
ast.target: 文件更改后重新扫描前的延迟

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How skill and command names are displayed in the list
ast.target: 技能和命令名称在列表中的显示方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable deep search when the view opens (can always be toggled in the search bar)
ast.target: 视图打开时启用深度搜索（始终可在搜索栏中切换）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to include when deep search is enabled
ast.target: 启用深度搜索时要包含的内容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command used to install skills from the marketplace
ast.target: 用于从市场安装技能的命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Scan all directories under the projects home folder for project-level skills
ast.target: 扫描项目主目录下的所有目录以查找项目级技能

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Root directory to scan for project-level skills. Leave empty for home directory (~).
ast.target: 扫描项目级技能的根目录。留空则使用主目录 (~)。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: What do you want to create?

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在系统资源管理器中显示

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请先选择要导出的消息

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid path — cannot save outside vault
ast.target: 无效路径——无法保存到库外

ast.name: aria-label
ast.target: 在系统资源管理器中显示

ast.name: auto
ast.target: 自动（前言 / 标题 / 文件名）

ast.name: message
ast.target: 未闭合的前置元数据块，缺少结束的 ---

ast.name: message
ast.source: name must be lowercase alphanumeric with single hyphens, no leading/trailing hyphens
ast.target: 名称必须为小写字母数字，可使用单个连字符，且不能以连字符开头或结尾

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 在 skills.sh 上搜索技能...

ast.name: text
ast.source: Install skillkit to see usage stats, stale badges, and heavy skill warnings.
ast.target: 安装技能包以查看使用统计、过期徽章和繁重技能警告。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This skill hasn't been used in 30+ days
ast.target: 该技能已超过30天未使用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Install skillkit to unlock usage analytics, burn rate, context tax, and more.
ast.target: 安装 skillkit 以解锁使用分析、消耗率、上下文开销等功能。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 选择一个技能进行预览。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Search for skills to browse and install.
ast.target: 搜索技能以浏览和安装。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 将所选内容保存到保险库
